zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Cysoing於1215年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing30歲，母親Maria de Bourghelles31歲。她於1240年之前與Gerard De Rodes II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1261年享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Cysoing于1215年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing30岁，母亲Maria de Bourghelles31岁。她于1240年之前与Gerard De Rodes II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1261年享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Cysoing was born in 1215, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, was 30 and her mother, Maria de Bourghelles, was 31. She married Gerard De Rodes II before 1240. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1261, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Cysoing est née en 1215, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maria de Bourghelles, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Gerard De Rodes II avant 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1261, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Cysoing 1215 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing 30 und ihre Mutter Maria de Bourghelles 31. Sie hat vor 1240 Gerard De Rodes II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1261 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Cysoing è nata il nel 1215 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maria de Bourghelles, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Gerard De Rodes II prima del 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1261, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Cysoingが1215年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Jean III van Peteghem Cysoingは30歳，母Maria de Bourghellesは31歳であった。1240年以前にGerard De Rodes IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1261年に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Cysoing(이)가 1215년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria de Bourghelles(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1240년 이전 Gerard De Rodes II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Cysoing nasceu em 1215, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maria de Bourghelles, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerard De Rodes II antes 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1261, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Cysoing родилась в 1215 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria de Bourghelles, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerard De Rodes II перед 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1261 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Cysoing nació en 1215, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Jean III van Peteghem Cysoing, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maria de Bourghelles, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Gerard De Rodes II antes de 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1261, a la edad de 46 años.
